extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked solo 28km out, dropped PIDCOCK and HEALY on climbs, won by 38 seconds despite mid-race bike change.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR forced bike exchange while in breakaway, UAE held peloton at 20-30s allowing car access without losing contact.
HEALY sat on PIDCOCK wheels in chase rather than rotating, preserving energy for podium over catching POGAČAR.
PIDCOCK attacked penultimate climb when gap 18s, too late for victory but enough to drop HEALY for second.
UAE controlled entire race without multiple protected leaders, no team could contest their tempo even 100km out.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: imposed pace on hardest climbs exactly like Flanders, preferred solo with 28km remaining over any cooperation
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: second place after Brabantse Pijl runner-up, had endurance to follow late PIDCOCK attack and take podium
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: neutral: chased POGAČAR effectively until final climbs but lacked acceleration to seriously threaten, held third
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: neutral: made 15-rider select group but faded completely on final climbs, lost podium to KRON at line
rider_signals.KRON Andreas: positive: survived selections to reach final group, had sprint finish over LUTSENKO despite climbing deficit
rider_signals.SHEFFIELD Magnus: neutral: present in 10-rider breakaway showing ability to make elite selections on Ardennes climbs
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: neutral: drove pace in UAE chase of early break but pulled off before POGAČAR attack, tactical sacrifice
